face.structure: oval with defined cheekbones and a narrow chin

eyes.shape: sharp almond shape with slight upward slant
details: fine lines of contrasting darker brown around the iris
glistening highlights at the edge of pupil

face.expression: thoughtful with a hint of skepticism

skin.undertone: warm with a subtle golden hue
skin.texture: smooth with a few minor blemishes typical of adolescence
skin.rendering_notes: soft lighting with a semi-matte finish to add depth

hair.style: medium length, layered with soft waves
hair.flow: naturally flows to the right side, slightly tousled
details: light reflects with a subtle sheen creating dimension

character.aura: a blend of tranquility and intensity, suggesting hidden depths

outfit.design: dark fitted jacket with subtle patterns
details: sleek silver trims along the cuffs

composition.framing: medium close-up focusing from chest to above the head
composition.pose: slight tilt of the head to the left, chin dipped slightly
composition.gesture: right hand casually touching the chin, suggestive of contemplation

background.color_palette: muted shades of blue and grey
background.details: faint impression of swirling patterns, like smoke
background.rules: background to remain unobtrusive, enhancing the character's introspective mood
